spec_match.rationale: Accurately represents the core specifications of CHIPS, including the strict requirement that Partitioned cookies also carry SameSite=None and Secure attributes.

interactive.rationale: Outstanding interactivity. Implements panel step tab navigation and a live cookie builder containing 4 binary toggle switches that dynamically build headers and emit real-time specification diagnostic notes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent index: walks through the 4-step explainer and provides the interactive header builder with verification indicators.

edge_cases.rationale: Dynamically asserts cookie specification constraints (e.g. warning if Partitioned is set but Secure or SameSite=None are missing).

references.rationale: The page contains absolutely no see-also references to external specifications or databases. It fails the repository-wide hard rule: 'Every feature and concept page must include a chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link'.

design_system.rationale: Conforms beautifully to all styling conventions, utilizing monospace fonts, pill tags, custom code containers, and card layouts.

openQuestions.title: Add mandatory ChromeStatus entry link and standard see-also footer
openQuestions.detail: To comply with the repository-wide hard rule ('Every feature and concept page must include a chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link'), we must add a 'see also' footer section containing a link to ChromeStatus entry 5194473869017088, alongside references to the MDN Partitioned cookies guide.

summary: A highly compliant, beautifully styled conceptual sandbox introducing CHIPS cookie design. While it boasts rich tab structures and an outstanding dynamic header compiler, it currently fails the repository's hard rule by omitting a direct link to the ChromeStatus feature entry. Fixing this reference is a high priority.
